notes: Synthesized the July 16 visual-first CV baseline with the later performance record developed during the July 17 job-search work.

release_verification: Audit12 verified: 89/89 central release gates passed; 24/24 browser interaction checks passed at 320px, 390px, reduced motion, and desktop; zero tested horizontal overflow; public mirror and canonical rebuild preserved the synchronized hybrid.
